privileged_info_summary: The task involves fixing three synthetic Odoo CRM opportunities that are created orphaned (without customer links) by setup_task.sh: (1) 'Office Design Project - Gemini' must link to 'Gemini Furniture' (30 pts), (2) 'Q3 Consultation Services' must link to 'Azure Interior' (40 pts, identified via internal note), and (3) 'Software License Renewal - Deco Addict' must link to 'Deco Addict' (30 pts). All partners are pre-created in the Odoo database. The verifier checks that each opportunity's partner_id field is set correctly and that the write_date timestamp is after task_start to confirm actual modification.
